title: Enhanced Eagle Logo Entry Animation with Neon Glow, Service Button Navigation, and Global Smoothness

requirements.text: Enhance the eagle logo entry animation so neon glow activates from the eagle head first. Apply strongest electric blue neon glow on eagle head and eyes visible from first frame. Head area must feel like energy source with inner illumination, medium outline glow, and soft outer ambient aura.

quotes: The eagle should appear as if powering on from the head first
Apply strongest electric blue neon glow on the eagle head and eyes
Glow must already be visible from the first frame

acceptanceCriteria: Eagle head has strongest electric blue neon glow visible from first animation frame
Head area has three glow layers: inner illumination, medium outline glow, soft outer ambient aura
Head and eyes appear as the energy source with brightest glow intensity
Glow exists before animation begins (not animated from zero opacity)

requirements.text: Create energy spread effect during eagle logo entry where glow flows smoothly from head → wings → full body with subtle light propagation effect lasting 0.4–0.6s. No flashing or harsh transitions. Add short light bloom burst at head when animation starts and optional subtle shimmer sweep once across wings.

quotes: During entry animation, glow flows smoothly from head → wings → full body
Add short light bloom burst at the head when animation starts

acceptanceCriteria: Glow propagates from head to wings to body smoothly over 0.4–0.6 seconds
Light bloom burst appears at eagle head at animation start
Optional shimmer sweep effect moves across wings once
No flashing or harsh transitions during energy spread
Animation feels like AI emblem powering on from brain/head

requirements.text: Animate eagle logo parent container during entry with opacity 0 → 1, scale 0.85 → 1, translateY 25px → 0, duration 1–1.2s ease-out. Use GPU-accelerated transform animations only. After entry, glow stabilizes into continuous soft breathing pulse with head remaining slightly brighter than rest of eagle.

quotes: Animate parent container only: opacity: 0 → 1, scale: 0.85 → 1, translateY: 25px → 0, duration: 1–1.2s ease-out
Glow stabilizes into continuous soft breathing pulse
Head remains slightly brighter than rest of eagle

acceptanceCriteria: Parent container animates with opacity, scale, and translateY transforms over 1–1.2 seconds
Easing function is ease-out
Only GPU-accelerated transforms are used
After entry completes, glow transitions to soft breathing pulse
Eagle head maintains higher brightness than wings and body in final state

requirements.text: Link all 'Get Started' buttons in service details (AI Agents, AI Chatbots, Automation Services, etc.) to smoothly scroll to the Get In Touch section with animated scrolling (not instant jump). Add small press animation on button click before scrolling starts. Ensure scrolling offset accounts for sticky header so section is fully visible.

quotes: When a user clicks the 'Get Started' button inside any service detail, automatically navigate the user to the 'Get In Touch' section
Smoothly scroll to the Get In Touch section. Use animated smooth scrolling (not instant jump)
Ensure scrolling offset accounts for sticky header so section is fully visible

acceptanceCriteria: All service detail 'Get Started' buttons trigger smooth scroll to Get In Touch section
Button click includes small press animation before scroll begins
Scrolling is animated and smooth, not instant
Sticky header offset is accounted for so Get In Touch section is fully visible
No page reload or navigation to another page occurs
Behavior is consistent on mobile and desktop

requirements.text: Add slight highlight effect when Get In Touch section appears after scrolling from service detail buttons: soft fade-in and subtle glow activation around contact form to draw user attention.

quotes: Add slight highlight effect when the section appears: soft fade-in, subtle glow activation around contact form

acceptanceCriteria: Get In Touch section has soft fade-in effect when scrolled to from service buttons
Contact form area receives subtle glow activation to highlight it
Highlight effect is noticeable but not jarring
Effect triggers consistently when navigating from any service detail

requirements.text: Enable smooth scroll behavior globally across the entire website. Add 0.6s ease transitions globally for interactive elements. Buttons must use cubic-bezier easing for smoother interaction feel.
acceptanceCriteria: Global smooth scroll behavior is enabled site-wide
Interactive elements have 0.6s ease transitions applied globally
All buttons use cubic-bezier easing for press/hover interactions
Scroll behavior feels smooth without lag

requirements.text: Add fade + translateY animations to sections on scroll. Reduce sudden animation jumps. Enable GPU acceleration for all animations to improve performance and smoothness.
acceptanceCriteria: Sections animate with fade-in and translateY when scrolling into view
Animation timing is smooth without sudden jumps or jank
GPU acceleration (transform3d, will-change) is enabled for animations
Overall website scroll experience feels fluid and premium

constraints: Do not animate glow opacity from zero; glow must exist before animation begins
Use only GPU-accelerated transform animations for performance
Service detail 'Get Started' buttons must not open new pages or reload current page
Maintain smooth scrolling behavior on both mobile and desktop
nonGoals: Changing backend testimonial logic or data structures
Modifying the eagle logo SVG design or base structure beyond animation enhancements
Adding new service types or changing service data content
